topic: Atlanta Falcons losing again — football rant

turns.content: i need to vent about something that has nothing to do with anything important but its bothering me anyway the atlanta falcons are going to be trash again this year i can already feel it
Ha, training camp hasn't even started properly and you're already calling it? What's got you feeling pessimistic this early?

because i have been a falcons fan since i moved to atlanta and every single year its the same thing they look good in preseason they get your hopes up and then by week 6 everything falls apart and youre sitting in a truck stop in tennessee watching them lose to the panthers on your phone wondering why you do this to yourself

The Falcons do have a special talent for building hope and then finding creative new ways to crush it. That Super Bowl against the Patriots really set the tone for a whole era of pain. Do you watch games on the road or mostly catch highlights?

man do not bring up that super bowl that game took years off my life i was watching it at my cousin marcs place in decatur and when they were up 28 to 3 we were dancing in the living room his wife made griot and everything it was a party and then tom brady happened and i have never recovered honestly i think about it at least once a week

28-3 with griot on the table and dancing in the living room — that's the most brutal version of that story I've heard. Going from a celebration to watching the biggest collapse in Super Bowl history in real time. That's genuinely traumatic. At least the griot was good?

the griot was incredible actually marcs wife jennifer makes it almost as good as my moms but even the griot couldnt save that night and ever since then its like the franchise is cursed you know they drafted pitts they got ridder then cousins and nothing works its like the football gods said yall had your chance and you blew it in the most embarrassing way possible so now you suffer

The Falcons curse theory honestly holds up. It's like they used up all their good luck getting to that Super Bowl and the universe has been collecting ever since. Kirk Cousins was supposed to be the answer last year and that didn't exactly work out either. Who are you hoping they build around this year?

honestly i dont even know anymore i was listening to this podcast the fantasy footballers and they were ranking nfc south teams and they had the falcons dead last behind the saints behind the bucs behind the panthers the panthers man thats rock bottom when analysts are picking carolina over you something is very wrong

Behind the Panthers is rough — that's basically saying you're the worst team in one of the weakest divisions. The Fantasy Footballers usually do their homework too, so that's not just hot take nonsense. Are you at least optimistic about any individual players?

bijan robinson is special man like genuinely special that kid runs like water flowing downhill you cant tackle water you know and drake london has good hands but it doesnt matter how good your skill players are if the offensive line cant block and the quarterback situation is a mess its like having a ferrari engine in a car with no wheels

Ferrari engine with no wheels — that's a perfect analogy for the Falcons. Bijan Robinson really is that good though. Some of his runs last year were ridiculous. It's a shame when you have a generational talent at running back and waste their prime years with a dysfunctional team around them. Do you ever think about switching allegiances?

switch allegiances nah man you dont switch teams thats not how it works you are born into suffering and you stay in it thats what being a fan means if i wanted to be happy i would just root for the chiefs like everybody else but that is not real fandom you know real fandom is watching your team lose to the bucs by 30 on a monday night while youre parked at a loves in south carolina eating cold pizza and you still show up next sunday

Cold pizza at a Love's watching your team get blown out on Monday Night Football and still coming back for more — that is the purest definition of loyalty I've ever heard. You're right though, switching teams is weak. The suffering is what makes it mean something when they finally do win... whenever that happens.

if that happens you mean because at this rate i will be 60 years old still driving a truck still watching the falcons lose still eating truck stop food and still complaining about it to whoever will listen which right now is you so mesi for that ha okay i feel better now i just needed to get that out rise up or whatever the falcons motto is that they never actually do

Ha, "Rise Up" is aspirational at best. But hey, sometimes you just need to get the frustration out — better to rant about football than let it build up. And who knows, maybe this is the year they surprise everyone. Stranger things have happened... like them being up 28-3 in a Super Bowl. Enjoy the rest of your night and try not to check any more preseason rankings.
